name: Build Summary SQL
Format Summary Response
Build Model Mix SQL
Format Model Mix Response
Build Hourly Production SQL
Format Hourly Production Response
Build Rejection Today SQL
func:
let now = new Date();
let yyyy = now.getFullYear();
let mm = String(now.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0');
let dd = String(now.getDate()).padStart(2,'0');
let start = `${yyyy}-${mm}-${dd} 08:00:00`;
let end = `${yyyy}-${mm}-${dd} 20:00:00`;

msg.topic = `
SELECT label, SUM(cnt) AS count
FROM (
  SELECT 'ECR Status' AS label, CASE WHEN UPPER(TRIM(ecrStatus))='FAIL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS cnt FROM log_book WHERE timeStamp BETWEEN '${start}' AND '${end}'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'LVS Status', CASE WHEN UPPER(TRIM(lvsStatus))='FAIL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM log_book WHERE timeStamp BETWEEN '${start}' AND '${end}'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'HV Status', CASE WHEN UPPER(TRIM(hvStatus))='FAIL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM log_book WHERE timeStamp BETWEEN '${start}' AND '${end}'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'IR Status', CASE WHEN UPPER(TRIM(irStatus))='FAIL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM log_book WHERE timeStamp BETWEEN '${start}' AND '${end}'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'LC Status', CASE WHEN UPPER(TRIM(lcStatus))='FAIL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM log_book WHERE timeStamp BETWEEN '${start}' AND '${end}'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Speed Status', CASE WHEN
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(s1Status,'')))='FAIL' OR
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(s2Status,'')))='FAIL' OR
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(s3Status,'')))='FAIL' OR
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(s4Status,'')))='FAIL' OR
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(s5Status,'')))='FAIL' OR
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(s6Status,'')))='FAIL' OR
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(s7Status,'')))='FAIL' OR
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(s8Status,'')))='FAIL' OR
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(s9Status,'')))='FAIL' OR
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(s10Status,'')))='FAIL'
  THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM log_book WHERE timeStamp BETWEEN '${start}' AND '${end}'
) t
GROUP BY label
ORDER BY count DESC
`;
return msg;

name: Format Rejection Today Response
func:
msg.payload = (msg.payload || []).map(row => ({ label: row.label, value: row.count }));
return msg;

name: Build Rejection 7 Days SQL
Format Rejection 7 Days Response

name: Insert Page SQL
Update Page SQL
Delete Page SQL
Select Roles Ordered
func:
msg.topic = `
SELECT 
  r.id AS role_id,
  r.name AS role_name,
  rp.category_id,
  c.name AS category_name,
  rp.category_sort_order,
  rp.page_id,
  p.name AS page_name,
  rp.sort_order
FROM roles r
LEFT JOIN role_pages rp ON r.id = rp.role_id
LEFT JOIN pages p ON rp.page_id = p.id
LEFT JOIN categories c ON rp.category_id = c.id
ORDER BY 
  r.id,
  COALESCE(rp.category_sort_order, 999999),
  COALESCE(rp.sort_order, 999999);
`;
return msg;
